externalAssets.name: ElevenLabs Dutch voice-pack
externalAssets.source: ElevenLabs text-to-speech, model eleven_v3, voice Lily - Velvety Actress, generated build-time through /v1/text-to-speech
externalAssets.license: Generated via ElevenLabs API; usage governed by ElevenLabs terms for this project
externalAssets.author: ElevenLabs Lily - Velvety Actress
externalAssets.notes: 1557 MP3 clips are stored locally and loaded from same-origin runtime paths. The current game catalog requires 1489 unique lines and is checked by the audio audit. The game does not call ElevenLabs, Web Speech, or any external TTS API during play.

externalAssets.name: ElevenLabs Dutch reading phoneme pack
externalAssets.source: ElevenLabs text-to-speech, model eleven_v3, voice Lily - Velvety Actress, generated build-time through /v1/text-to-speech
externalAssets.license: Generated via ElevenLabs API; usage governed by ElevenLabs terms for this project
externalAssets.author: ElevenLabs Lily - Velvety Actress
externalAssets.notes: 32 isolated reading phoneme MP3 clips are stored locally for tap-to-hear letters and digraphs. Whole-word and zoem actions use natural local Lily word clips at a slower playback rate; rejected stretched TTS blends and browser speech are not used at runtime.

generatedAssets.name: Procedural quantity SVGs
generatedAssets.author: Codex for this local project
generatedAssets.notes: Dot cards, dice, dominoes, fingers, frames, beads, blocks, eggs, paw prints, numerals, and mixed cards are generated locally at runtime.

generatedAssets.name: Procedural Three.js scenes
generatedAssets.author: Codex for this local project
generatedAssets.notes: Blocky city, runner track, WebWoud anchors, and hub visuals use local geometry, CSS, and SVG.

generatedAssets.name: Web Audio cues
generatedAssets.author: Codex for this local project
generatedAssets.notes: Short success, snap, rescue, build, and soft-error tones are generated with the Web Audio API.

generatedAssets.name: Browser vibration cues
generatedAssets.author: Codex for this local project
generatedAssets.notes: Optional short mobile vibration patterns are generated through the browser Vibration API and can be disabled in settings.

generatedAssets.name: Local app shell icons, manifest, and offline cache
generatedAssets.author: Codex for this local project
generatedAssets.notes: Installable mobile shell metadata, the local SVG icon, and a same-origin offline cache service worker are generated for this project. The worker precaches current hashed entry and lazy code bundles at install, while local voice clips cache on demand; no remote icons, app-store assets, or CDN caches are used.

notes: Runtime assets are loaded locally. External-source voice clips are generated build-time, stored under public/audio, and documented above; no runtime external asset requests or browser speech synthesis are used. Isolated reading phonemes use the local ElevenLabs phoneme pack, while whole words use the local Lily sentence pack.
